hero.name: Gilbert
roles: Umwiga wa software engineering muri A2SV
hero.description: Ndi web developer na designer ukorera i Kigali mu Rwanda. Nibanda ku kubaka imbuga zigezweho, porogaramu za web zuzuye, n'ubunararibonye bwa digitale busobanutse kandi bworoshye ku masitatarapu, ibirango n'ubucuruzi buri gukura. Kuri ubu ndi mu mahugurwa ya software engineering muri A2SV (Africa to Silicon Valley), aho nkomeza kubaka porogaramu zikoreshwa mu buzima busanzwe, zishobora kwaguka kandi zifite ubuziranenge ku ruhande rw'isura n'imikoreshereze.

about.title: Ibyerekeye
about.description: Ndi frontend na full-stack developer ukorera i Kigali mu Rwanda, nkunda cyane web development igezweho, web design, UI/UX ndetse no gutunganya umuziki. Mu mahugurwa ya A2SV ndushaho kwimenyereza data structures, algorithms, system design no gukemura ibibazo byo mu buzima busanzwe. Nishimira guhindura ibitekerezo bikavamo ibicuruzwa bya digitale bikora neza, binyuze muri code isukuye, design itekerejweho n'uburambe bwiza bw'abakoresha.

expertiseDescription.frontend: Kubaka interfaces z'abakoresha zikorana neza, zigezweho kandi zisubiza neza ku bikoresho byose.
expertiseDescription.uiux: Gukora design nziza, isobanutse kandi yorohereza abakoresha kuyikoresha neza.
expertiseDescription.music: Gutunganya umuziki n'amajwi ku rwego rwiza ku mishinga y'itangazamakuru n'imyidagaduro.

education.degree: Kwiga Computer Science na Applied Physics

services.title: Serivisi Ntanga
services.description: Ntanga serivisi zitandukanye za digitale zigufasha guhindura igitekerezo cyawe kikaba umushinga ufatika, uhereye ku gukora imbuga za web kugeza kuri design no gutunganya amajwi.

serviceList.title: Gukora imbuga za web
serviceList.description: Kubaka imbuga na porogaramu za web zigezweho, zikozwe mu buryo bw'umwuga kandi zita ku mikorere myiza.

serviceList.title: Igishushanyo cya UI/UX
serviceList.description: Gukora interfaces nziza kandi zorohereza abakoresha kugira uburambe bwiza.

serviceList.title: Gutunganya umuziki
serviceList.description: Serivisi z'umwuga mu gutunganya umuziki n'amajwi ku mishinga itandukanye.

serviceList.title: Gukora porogaramu za full-stack
serviceList.description: Ibisubizo byuzuye bya web, birimo frontend, backend n'ububiko bw'amakuru.

serviceList.title: Design ihera kuri mobile
serviceList.description: Gukora design ibanza kwita kuri telefone n'ibindi bikoresho bito mbere yo kwaguka ku binini.
features: Gukora no mu gihe nta internet

serviceList.title: Serivisi z'amajwi
serviceList.description: Gutunganya, gusukura no kunoza amajwi ku buryo bw'umwuga ku podcasts n'ibindi birimo bya multimedia.

projects.title: Imishinga Yatoranyijwe
projects.description: Dore zimwe mu mishinga yanjye iheruka mu bijyanye na web development, design n'amajwi. Buri mushinga ugaragaza ikibazo cyari gihari n'uburyo cyakemuwe.
projects.listHeading: Andika nimero cyangwa izina ry'umushinga kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro birambuye.

marketplacePro.title: MarketPlace Pro
marketplacePro.description: Porogaramu y’isoko yuzuye ifite imikorere y’abakoresha benshi, ubutumwa, kwishyura n’ubucuruzi bw’imodoka.

nyagatareSchool.title: Urubuga rw’Ishuri rya Nyagatare
nyagatareSchool.description: Urubuga rw’ishuri rwa none rwerekana ibikorwa, kwiyandikisha, inkunga, n’akaguru ka AI.

urAcademicHub.title: UR Academic Resource Hub
urAcademicHub.description: Urubuga rw’amashuri rw’abanyeshuri ba Kaminuza y’u Rwanda rufite ubushakashatsi, kohereza no kuyobora.

privateCoupleChat.title: Private Couple Chat
privateCoupleChat.description: Porogaramu y’ubutumwa bwite ifite ubutumwa bw’ako kanya, umutekano n’ubufatanye mu kohereza amafoto.

tourBooking.title: Tour Booking & Exploring
tourBooking.description: Urubuga rwo gusura ahantu rutuma abakiriya bashobora kubika ingendo no kureba ibyiza mu buryo burambuye.

consultingPlatform.title: Consulting Platform
consultingPlatform.description: Urubuga rwerekana serivisi za konsitanti hamwe n’amafishi akora neza n’imyambarire ikurura.

onlineLearning.title: Online Learning Platform
onlineLearning.description: Urubuga rw’amashuri kuri internet rufite kwiyandikisha, uburambe bworoshye n’ikoranabuhanga rigezweho.

tresor.title: Tuyizere Tresor - Portfolio
tresor.description: Urubuga rwa portfolio rukwerekana ubuhanga, ubunararibonye n’imishinga mu buryo bugezweho.

orangeflix.description: Urubuga rwo kureba filime kuri internet rufite imikorere yo kwiyandikisha n’uruhande rw’umuyobozi.

aimablePortfolio.title: Aimable Bizimungu - Portfolio
aimablePortfolio.description: Urubuga bwa portfolio bw’umwuga burimo ubunararibonye n’imishinga mu buryo busobanutse.

akimana.title: AKIMANA Etienne - Portfolio
akimana.description: Urubuga rw’ishyirahamwe ryerekana serivisi n’amakuru y’ikigo mu buryo bugezweho.

musicStreaming.title: Music Streaming Interface
musicStreaming.description: Igishushanyo cyerekana uburyo bwo kumva umuziki mu buryo bworoshye kandi bwiza.

gallery.title: Galerie y'imishinga
gallery.intro: Imishinga n'ibishushanyo bifitanye isano n'ikirango cyanjye bwite.

gilbertPortrait.title: Portrait - Gilbert
gilbertPortrait.description: Ifoto y’umwimerere ya Gilbert ikwerekana umwuga n’icyerekezo.

casualPortrait.title: Casual Portrait
casualPortrait.description: Ifoto y’imyambarire yoroheje ijyanye n’ikirango cy’umwuga.

businessCard.title: Business Card
businessCard.description: Ikarita y’akazi yerekana ikirango cyawe mu buryo bugezweho.

businessLanding.title: Business Landing Page
businessLanding.description: Urupapuro rwo kwakira abakiriya rwubatswe ku buryo bujyanye no guhindura abayobozi.

ecommerceApp.title: E-Commerce Web App
ecommerceApp.description: Urubuga rw’ubucuruzi kuri internet rwuzuyemo imyanya yo kugura, kwishyura no gushakira ibintu.

adminDashboard.description: Icyegeranyo cyerekana ibipimo n’isesengura mu buryo buboneye.

blogPlatform.description: Urubuga rwa blog rufite inkuru, markdown na SEO byubahirizwa.

apiIntegration.description: Umushinga wihuza APIs ufite umutekano na kureba neza ibimenyetso.

uiLibrary.title: UI Component Library
uiLibrary.description: Inzu y’ibikoresho bya UI ikozwe na Tailwind na shadcn/ui.

personalInfo.name: Tuyambaze Gilbert
personalInfo.bio: Nubaka porogaramu za web zigezweho kandi zihamye hamwe na React na Tailwind.

footer.description: Ndi developer ufite ishyaka n'ubuhanga bwo guhanga, kandi nkunda kubaka uburambe bwa digitale bufite ireme binyuze muri web development igezweho, design iteguye neza n'ibirimo bifite intego.
footer.faqTitle: Ibibazo bikunze kubazwa kuri Gilbert Tuyambaze
footer.faqDescription: Amakuru y'inyongera afasha abantu bashaka web developer cyangwa web designer i Kigali, mu Rwanda.

faq.question: Gilbert Tuyambaze ni nde?
faq.answer: Ndi web developer na designer ukorera i Kigali mu Rwanda, kandi nubaka imbuga zigezweho, portfolio zifite ireme n'interfaces zorohereza abakoresha.

faq.question: Ni izihe serivisi zigaragara kuri uru rubuga?
faq.answer: Uru rubuga rugaragaza akazi kanjye muri web design i Kigali, frontend development, landing pages, portfolio websites, business websites, kunoza UI ndetse n'ubufasha bwa full-stack.

faq.question: Abantu bansanga bakoresheje ayahe magambo?
faq.answer: Abantu bashobora kumbona banyuze mu gushakisha nka Gilbert Tuyambaze, Tuyambaze Gilbert, Kigali web developer, Kigali Rwanda web design, Rwanda frontend developer na web designer in Kigali.

faq.question: Kuki aya makuru ari muri popup?
faq.answer: Mbika aya makuru muri popup kugira ngo footer igume isukuye kandi yoroshye gusoma, ariko amakuru y'ingenzi ku kazi kanjye, aho nkorera na serivisi ntanga abe ahari igihe akenewe.

legal.title: Uburenganzira bw'umwanditsi
legal.content: Ibiri kuri uru rubuga byose byanditswe cyangwa byakozwe na Gilbert Tuyambaze, harimo inyandiko, ibisobanuro by'imishinga, ibitekerezo bya design, amashusho yabugenewe n'imiterere y'urubuga, ni umutungo we bwite keretse aho byagaragajwe ukundi. Nta wemerewe kubikoporora, kubigurisha cyangwa kubisakaza atabiherewe uburenganzira.

legal.title: Amategeko yo gukoresha uru rubuga
legal.content: Uru rubuga rugenewe kwerekana umwuga, kwakira abashaka gukorana na Gilbert Tuyambaze no gutanga amakuru y'imishinga ye. Abarusura bemerewe kurureba, gusangira link yarwo no kumwandikira ku bijyanye n'akazi cyangwa ubufatanye. Birabujijwe kwiyitirira, gukoresha scraping mbi cyangwa gusubiramo ibirimo birinzwe nta ruhushya.

legal.title: Amakuru bwite n'itumanaho
legal.content: Iyo utanze amakuru yawe binyuze kuri uru rubuga, urugero nk'izina, email, umutwe n'ubutumwa, akoreshwa gusa mu itumanaho, kuganira ku mushinga no gukurikirana abakiliya. Ayo makuru ntacuruzwa kandi ntakoreshwa ku kwamamaza kutajyanye n'icyo wayatanzeho.

legal.title: Umutekano n'imikoreshereze iboneye
legal.content: Hakoreshwa uburyo bushoboka kugira ngo uru rubuga rugume rufite umutekano, rukore neza kandi rworohereze abarukoresha ku bikoresho bigezweho. Abarusura bagomba kwirinda kugerageza kurwinjiramo mu buryo butemewe, gukora spam cyangwa ibikorwa bihungabanya imikorere yarwo. Serivisi n'amahuza by'abandi bikurikiza amategeko n'imigenzereze yabyo bwite.

footer.popupSeoSummary: Nubaka imbuga za web zihuza ibikoresho byose, portfolio zigezweho n'interfaces z'ubucuruzi ku bantu bashaka web developer i Kigali, mu Rwanda. Iyi popup itanga ibisobanuro by'ingenzi ku hantu nkorera na serivisi ntanga, ariko idafata umwanya uhoraho muri footer.
footer.popupSearchHint: Iyo umuntu ashakisha Tuyambaze, Gilbert, Kigali design, Kigali Rwanda web design, Rwanda frontend developer, portfolio website developer Kigali, website designer in Rwanda cyangwa frontend engineer in Kigali, iki gice gifasha guhuza ayo magambo n'akazi kanjye, ubumenyi bwanjye n'uburyo bwo kunyandikira bugaragara ku rubuga.

pwa.installDescription: Iyibike ku gikoresho cyawe kugirango uyigereho vuba.

console.help:
Amabwiriza aboneka:
help, clear, minimize, exit
sections, goto <section>
hero, about, gilbert, images, image <name|number>, education, services
projects, project <name|number>, gallery
contact, socials, resume, cv
open <project>, github <project>
message, send message

Uburyo bwo kureba umwirondoro:
- Andika hero urebe incamake, ibyo nagezeho, imbaraga n'akazi nakoze vuba aha
- Andika gilbert urebe ibisobanuro byanjye n'amafoto yanjye bwite
- Andika images ubone urutonde rw'amafoto ya Gilbert n'ibijyanye na branding
- Hanyuma andika nimero cyangwa izina ry'ifoto kugira ngo uyifungure
- Andika education urebe amashuri n'impamyabushobozi

Uburyo bwo kureba imishinga:
- Andika cyangwa ukande projects ubone urutonde rw'imishinga yose
- Hanyuma andika nimero cyangwa izina ry'umushinga kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro birambuye

Sisiteme ishobora kumenya umushinga ikoresheje nimero, igice cy'izina, inyuguti zahinduwe, kwandika kutuzuye cyangwa amazina asa.
Uburyo bwo kohereza ubutumwa muri terminal bugendera ku ntambwe zikurikirana: name > email > subject > message > confirm.
Andika cancel igihe icyo ari cyo cyose ushaka guhagarika.

Ingero:
- help
- education
- projects
- project 1

console.gotoFailure: Agace "{{section}}" ntikamenyekanye. Koresha sections urebe ahaboneka.
console.about:
Ndi Gilbert Tuyambaze.
Ndi frontend na full-stack developer, umushushanyi wa UI/UX ndetse n'umunyabugeni mu ikoranabuhanga.
Kuri ubu ndi mu mahugurwa ya software engineering muri A2SV.
Ikoranabuhanga nkoresha cyane harimo React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js na Tailwind CSS.
console.education:
Amashuri n'impamyabushobozi
- Software Engineering Fellowship | A2SV (Africa to Silicon Valley) | 2026 - Ubu
- Yitegura kwiga BSc Computer Science na BSc Applied Physics | Kaminuza | 2025 - Ubu
- Full Stack Web Development | Coding Bootcamp | 2024 - 2025
- Icyemezo mu gutunganya umuziki | Audio Institute | 2024
console.hero:
Incamake
Nibanda ku gukora imbuga za web zigezweho, zikorera neza kandi zifite isura nziza.
Iby'ingenzi byangaragariza: ndi mu mahugurwa ya software engineering muri A2SV, maze gukora imishinga myinshi ya portfolio n'iy'abakiliya, kandi mfite ubunararibonye mu web apps, branding na creative tech.
Aho mfite imbaraga cyane harimo React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, kunoza UI, gukora interfaces zihindagurika neza no guhindura ibitekerezo bikavamo ibicuruzwa bifatika.
Mu mishinga aheruka gukora harimo marketplace systems, urubuga rw'amasomo, apps z'ubutumwa bwihariye, imbuga z'ubujyanama na portfolio z'abantu ku giti cyabo.
console.gilbert:
Gilbert Hub
Ndi frontend na full-stack developer ukorera i Kigali, umushushanyi wa UI/UX ndetse n'umunyabugeni mu ikoranabuhanga.
Nubaka interfaces zigezweho, porogaramu za web zishobora kwaguka n'uburambe bwiza bw'abakoresha nkoresheje React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js na Tailwind CSS.

Ibyo ushobora gukurikizaho:
- hero: ibyo nagezeho, imbaraga n'akazi nakoze vuba aha
- about: incamake y'umwuga
- education: amashuri n'impamyabushobozi
- contact: email, telefoni n'uburyo bwo kohereza ubutumwa

Imishinga ihari:
{{projects}}

Intambwe ikurikira:
Andika hero, about, education, contact, projects cyangwa images.
Ushobora kandi kwandika project ukongeraho nimero cyangwa izina ry'umushinga kugira ngo ubone ibisobanuro birambuye.

contact.title: Twandikire
contact.description: Urashaka web developer cyangwa web designer i Kigali, mu Rwanda? Nishimira kumva ibijyanye n'urubuga rwawe, igicuruzwa cyawe cyangwa umushinga wawe wo kuvugurura urubuga. Nyandikira, nzagusubiza vuba bishoboka.
contact.connectDescription: Mpora niteguye kwakira amahirwe mashya muri frontend development, full-stack web apps, web design, UI/UX n'imikoranire ya freelance i Kigali no hanze yayo.

email.title: Imeyili
email.description: Unyoherereze imeyili igihe icyo ari cyo cyose!

contact.errorSubmit: Habaye ikibazo mu kohereza ifishi, ongera ugerageze.

socialProof.title: Ubutumwa bw'abamaze gukorana nanjye
socialProof.description: Aha hagaragara testimonials na feedback zivuye ku bakiliya, abafatanyabikorwa n'andi matsinda nakoranye na yo, kugira ngo umuntu usuye urubuga ahite yumva uko gukorana nanjye bimeze.
socialProof.emptyDescription: Ifishi iri hasi irakora, bityo ubutumwa bwa mbere bwoherejwe buzahita bugaragara hano.

form.title: Ohereza testimonial cyangwa feedback
form.name: Amazina
form.placeholder: Vuga uko byari bimeze gukorana nanjye cyangwa utange igitekerezo cyawe mu bwisanzure.
form.success: Murakoze. Ubutumwa bwawe bwongewe muri uru rutonde.
form.error: Ntibyashobotse kubika ubutumwa bwawe. Ongera ugerageze.

dashboard.title: Dashboard igenzura portfolio
dashboard.description: Winjiyemo nka {{email}}. Hano ushobora guhindura umubare w'abasuye, kureba ubutumwa bwoherejwe no gucunga testimonials na feedback zigaragara ku rubuga.
dashboard.setupDescription: Shyira amakuru ya Firebase muri environment, ufungure Firestore na Firebase Authentication, hanyuma ukore document y'uburenganzira bwa admin.
dashboard.roleDescription: Iyi konti yarinjiye ariko ntirafite role ya admin. Kora document ya roles/{uid} muri Firestore kugira ngo ufungure dashboard.
dashboard.summaryText: Koresha iyi dashboard kugira ngo uhindure social proof igaragazwa ku rubuga, uhishire ibyo udashaka kwerekana kandi unanonosore amagambo igihe bikenewe.

errors.login: Kwinjira byanze. Reba admin credentials na Firebase Auth.
errors.load: Ntibyashobotse gupakurura dashboard. Reba admin role, Firestore rules na Functions deployment.
